description: A 120mm diameter flywheel with a raised 40mm hub boss, a 16mm center bore, and six 22mm lightening holes spaced on a 70mm pitch circle diameter.
components: Main disc (cylinder, D=120mm, H=20mm, Z=0 to 20)
Raised hub boss (cylinder, D=40mm, H=10mm, Z=20 to 30)
Center bore (subtractive cylinder, D=16mm, H=30mm, Z=0 to 30)
Six lightening holes (subtractive cylinders, D=22mm, H=20mm, Z=0 to 20, spaced at 60-degree intervals on a 35mm radius)
notes: Ensure the center bore passes completely through both the hub boss and the main disc (Z=0 to Z=30). The 6 lightening holes must only pass through the main disc (Z=0 to Z=20) and should be positioned at angles: 0, 60, 120, 180, 240, and 300 degrees.
